_comment: Per-model list pricing used by the Run Cost Meter (costForUsage/runCost in src/runner/cost.ts). USD per million tokens (Mtok), matching each provider's public list price for the apiModel configured in models.json. Entries marked "estimate": true are a best guess where the exact current list price wasn't confidently known, replace with the provider's published number when confirmed. The "source" field records where a non-estimate price came from: "litellm" (BerriAI/litellm's model_prices_and_context_window.json), "cloudprice" (cloudprice.net's mirror of the same LiteLLM schema, used when a model is missing usable flat pricing from LiteLLM, direct-provider entries only, never its openrouter/-prefixed entries), "openrouter" (openrouter.ai/api/v1/models, used when a model is missing from both LiteLLM and CloudPrice), or "manual". Run `bun run update-pricing` (scripts/update-pricing.ts) to refresh from those sources; it also prints a best-effort console warning if models.dev's price for a model differs by more than 10%. Add an entry here whenever a new model id is added to models.json; unknown model ids fall back to a documented default in cost.ts.
